center.name: 福塔莱萨
center.summary: 福塔莱萨是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Grey pileated finch，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species is native to South America, being found in northern Venezuela and northern and eastern Colombia, with a separate population in eastern Brazil extending from Fortaleza southward to Rio de Janeiro and as far west as the southern Mato Grosso

links.evidence: This species is native to South America, being found in northern Venezuela and northern and eastern Colombia, with a separate population in eastern Brazil extending from Fortaleza southward to Rio de Janeiro and as far west as the southern Mato Grosso
